        private static void ReorderSearchUI(Stationpedia stationpedia, List<ScoredResult> scoredResults)
        {
            var searchContents = stationpedia.SearchContents;
            if (searchContents == null) return;
            
            // Group by priority, then by category within lower priorities
            var exactMatches = scoredResults.Where(r => r.Priority == MatchPriority.ExactTitle).ToList();
            var startsWithMatches = scoredResults.Where(r => r.Priority == MatchPriority.TitleStartsWith).ToList();
            var containsMatches = scoredResults.Where(r => r.Priority == MatchPriority.TitleContains).ToList();
            var descriptionMatches = scoredResults.Where(r => r.Priority == MatchPriority.DescriptionContains).ToList();
            
            int siblingIndex = 0;
            
            // Add "Exact Matches" section
            if (exactMatches.Count > 0)
            {
                siblingIndex = AddCategoryHeader(searchContents, "🎯 Exact Matches", siblingIndex);
                foreach (var result in exactMatches.OrderBy(r => r.Page.Title))
                {
                    result.ItemTransform.SetSiblingIndex(siblingIndex++);
                }
            }
            
            // Add "Title Starts With" section
            if (startsWithMatches.Count > 0)
            {
                siblingIndex = AddCategoryHeader(searchContents, "📌 Title Starts With", siblingIndex);
                foreach (var result in startsWithMatches.OrderBy(r => r.Page.Title))
                {
                    result.ItemTransform.SetSiblingIndex(siblingIndex++);
                }
            }
            
            // For "Contains" and "Description" matches, group by category
            var remainingMatches = containsMatches.Concat(descriptionMatches).ToList();
            if (remainingMatches.Count > 0)
            {
                // Group by category
                var byCategory = remainingMatches
                    .GroupBy(r => r.Category)
                    .OrderBy(g => g.Key);
                
                foreach (var categoryGroup in byCategory)
                {
                    string headerText = $"📁 {categoryGroup.Key}";
                    siblingIndex = AddCategoryHeader(searchContents, headerText, siblingIndex);
                    
                    foreach (var result in categoryGroup.OrderBy(r => r.Page.Title))
                    {
                        result.ItemTransform.SetSiblingIndex(siblingIndex++);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Force layout rebuild
            LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(searchContents);
            
            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Reorganized: {exactMatches.Count} exact, {startsWithMatches.Count} starts-with, {remainingMatches.Count} other");
        }
```

        private static void CleanupCategoryHeaders()
        {
            foreach (var header in _searchCategoryHeaders)
            {
                if (header != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(header);
                }
            }
            _searchCategoryHeaders.Clear();
            _lastSearchText = "";
            _lastResultCount = -1;

```
        private static void SetItemSiblingIndex(RectTransform parent, ScoredResult result, int targetIndex)
        {
            // Find the SPDAListItem that matches this result
            foreach (Transform child in parent)
            {
                var listItem = child.GetComponent<SPDAListItem>();
                if (listItem == null) continue;
                
                string itemTitle = Regex.Replace(listItem.InsertTitle?.text ?? "", "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
                string pageTitle = Regex.Replace(result.Page.Title ?? "", "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
                
                if (string.Equals(itemTitle, pageTitle, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    child.SetSiblingIndex(targetIndex);
                    return;
                }
            }
        }

        private static void CleanupCategoryHeaders()
        {
            foreach (var header in _searchCategoryHeaders)
            {
                if (header != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(header);
                }
            }
            _searchCategoryHeaders.Clear();
            _lastSearchText = "";
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Reset state for hot-reload support.
        /// </summary>
        public static void Reset()
        {
            CleanupCategoryHeaders();
        }
    }
}
```

                    string headerText = $"📁 {categoryGroup.Key}";
                    siblingIndex = AddCategoryHeader(searchContents, headerText, siblingIndex);
```

        private static StationpediaPage FindPageByTitle(string title)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(title)) return null;
            
            // Remove any rich text tags for comparison
            string cleanTitle = Regex.Replace(title, "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
            
            foreach (var page in Stationpedia.StationpediaPages)
            {
                string pageTitle = Regex.Replace(page.Title ?? "", "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
                if (string.Equals(pageTitle, cleanTitle, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    return page;
                }
            }
            
            // Debug: log when we can't find a page
            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] Could not find page for title: '{cleanTitle}'");
            return null;
        }
```

        private static List<ScoredResult> ScoreResults(
            List<(SPDAListItem item, StationpediaPage page, Transform transform)> items,
            string searchText)
        {
            var results = new List<ScoredResult>();
            string searchLower = searchText.ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
            
            // Debug: log first few items to see what we're working with
            int debugCount = 0;
            
            foreach (var (item, page, transform) in items)
            {
                // Use the display title from the list item, not the page
                string displayTitle = item.InsertTitle?.text ?? "";
                string title = Regex.Replace(displayTitle, "<[^>]+>", "").ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
                
                if (debugCount < 5)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] Item: '{displayTitle}' -> cleaned: '{title}' | page.Title: '{page?.Title}'");
                    debugCount++;
                }
                
                MatchPriority priority;
                
                // Check for exact match (whole word)
                if (title == searchLower)
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.ExactTitle;
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] EXACT: '{title}' == '{searchLower}'");
                }
                else if (title.StartsWith(searchLower + " ") || title.StartsWith(searchLower))
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.TitleStartsWith;
                }
                else if (title.Contains(searchLower))
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.TitleContains;
                }
                else
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.DescriptionContains;
                }
                
                // Get category from page
                string category = GetPageCategory(page);
                
                results.Add(new ScoredResult
                {
                    Page = page,
                    Priority = priority,
                    Category = category,
                    ItemTransform = transform
                });
            }
            
            return results;
        }
```

<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

- filePath: `c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\src\Harmony\SearchPatches.cs`
- newString:

```
        private static List<ScoredResult> ScoreResults(
            List<(SPDAListItem item, StationpediaPage page, Transform transform)> items,
            string searchText)
        {
            var results = new List<ScoredResult>();
            string searchLower = searchText.ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
            string escapedSearch = Regex.Escape(searchLower);
            
            // Word boundary pattern - matches search term as a whole word
            Regex wholeWordRegex = new Regex($@"\b{escapedSearch}\b", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);
            
            // Debug: log first few items to see what we're working with
            int debugCount = 0;
            
            foreach (var (item, page, transform) in items)
            {
                // Use the display title from the list item, not the page
                string displayTitle = item.InsertTitle?.text ?? "";
                string title = Regex.Replace(displayTitle, "<[^>]+>", "").ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
                
                bool isWholeWordMatch = wholeWordRegex.IsMatch(title);
                
                if (debugCount < 5)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] Item: '{title}' | wholeWord: {isWholeWordMatch}");
                    debugCount++;
                }
                
                MatchPriority priority;
                
                // Check for exact match (title is exactly the search term)
                if (title == searchLower)
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.ExactTitle;
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] EXACT: '{title}'");
                }
                // Check for starts-with as a whole word (e.g., "corn seed" starts with word "corn")
                else if (title.StartsWith(searchLower + " ") || (title.StartsWith(searchLower) && isWholeWordMatch))
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.TitleStartsWith;
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] STARTS: '{title}'");
                }
                // Check for whole word match anywhere in title (e.g., "popped corn" contains word "corn")
                else if (isWholeWordMatch)
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.TitleContains;
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] WORD MATCH: '{title}'");
                }
                // Partial match - search term is part of another word (e.g., "corner" contains "corn")
                else if (title.Contains(searchLower))
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.DescriptionContains; // Demote partial matches
                }
                else
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.DescriptionContains;
                }
                
                // Get category from page
                string category = GetPageCategory(page);
                
                results.Add(new ScoredResult
                {
                    Page = page,
                    Priority = priority,
                    Category = category,
                    ItemTransform = transform
                });
            }
            
            return results;
        }

```
        private static List<ScoredResult> ScoreResults(
            List<(SPDAListItem item, StationpediaPage page, Transform transform)> items,
            string searchText)
        {
            var results = new List<ScoredResult>();
            string searchLower = searchText.ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
            
            // Debug: log first few items to see what we're working with
            int debugCount = 0;
            
            foreach (var (item, page, transform) in items)
            {
                // Use the display title from the list item, not the page
                string displayTitle = item.InsertTitle?.text ?? "";
                string title = Regex.Replace(displayTitle, "<[^>]+>", "").ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
                
                if (debugCount < 5)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] Item: '{displayTitle}' -> cleaned: '{title}' | page.Title: '{page?.Title}'");
                    debugCount++;
                }
                
                MatchPriority priority;
                
                // Check for exact match (whole word)
                if (title == searchLower)
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.ExactTitle;
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] EXACT: '{title}' == '{searchLower}'");
                }
                else if (title.StartsWith(searchLower + " ") || title.StartsWith(searchLower))
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.TitleStartsWith;
                }
                else if (title.Contains(searchLower))
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.TitleContains;
                }
                else
                {
                    priority = MatchPriority.DescriptionContains;
                }
                
                // Get category from page
                string category = GetPageCategory(page);
                
                results.Add(new ScoredResult
                {
                    Page = page,
                    Priority = priority,
                    Category = category,
                    ItemTransform = transform
                });
            }
            
            return results;
        }

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Main reorganization method - call this after search results are populated.
        /// </summary>
        public static void ReorganizeSearchResults(Stationpedia stationpedia, string searchText)
        {
            try
            {
                if (stationpedia == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(searchText)) return;
                if (stationpedia.SearchContents == null) return;
                
                int currentCount = CountVisibleSearchResults(stationpedia.SearchContents);
                
                // Don't re-process the same search with same result count
                if (searchText == _lastSearchText && currentCount == _lastResultCount) return;
                _lastSearchText = searchText;
                _lastResultCount = currentCount;
                
                // Clean up previous headers
                CleanupCategoryHeaders();
                
                // Collect all visible SPDAListItem children with their pages
                var items = new List<(SPDAListItem item, StationpediaPage page, Transform transform)>();
                var existingPageKeys = new HashSet<string>();
                
                foreach (Transform child in stationpedia.SearchContents)
                {
                    if (!child.gameObject.activeSelf) continue;
                    
                    var listItem = child.GetComponent<SPDAListItem>();
                    if (listItem == null) continue;
                    
                    // Try to find the page for this item by matching the title
                    string title = listItem.InsertTitle?.text ?? "";
                    var page = FindPageByTitle(title);
                    
                    if (page != null)
                    {
                        items.Add((listItem, page, child));
                        existingPageKeys.Add(page.Key);
                    }
                }
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Reorganizing {items.Count} search results for '{searchText}'");
                
                // Find and inject missing exact/whole-word matches
                var injectedPages = FindMissingMatches(searchText, existingPageKeys);
                if (injectedPages.Count > 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Injecting {injectedPages.Count} missing matches");
                    InjectMissingResults(stationpedia, injectedPages, items, existingPageKeys);
                }
                
                if (items.Count == 0) return;
                
                // Score and categorize results
                var scoredResults = ScoreResults(items, searchText);
                
                // Reorganize the UI
                ReorderSearchUI(stationpedia, scoredResults);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Debug.LogError($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error in ReorganizeSearchResults: {ex.Message}\n{ex.StackTrace}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Find pages that should match the search but weren't returned by vanilla search.
        /// This fixes the vanilla bug where too many partial matches hide exact matches.
        /// </summary>
        private static List<StationpediaPage> FindMissingMatches(string searchText, HashSet<string> existingPageKeys)
        {
            var missingPages = new List<StationpediaPage>();
            string searchLower = searchText.ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
            string escapedSearch = Regex.Escape(searchLower);
            Regex wholeWordRegex = new Regex($@"\b{escapedSearch}\b", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);
            
            foreach (var page in Stationpedia.StationpediaPages)
            {
                // Skip if already in results
                if (existingPageKeys.Contains(page.Key)) continue;
                
                string title = Regex.Replace(page.Title ?? "", "<[^>]+>", "").ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
                
                // Check for exact match or whole-word match (high priority items only)
                bool isExact = title == searchLower;
                bool isWholeWord = wholeWordRegex.IsMatch(title);
                
                if (isExact || isWholeWord)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] INJECTING missing match: '{page.Title}' (exact: {isExact}, wholeWord: {isWholeWord})");
                    missingPages.Add(page);
                }
            }
            
            return missingPages;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Create UI elements for missing pages and add them to the search results.
        /// </summary>
        private static void InjectMissingResults(
            Stationpedia stationpedia,
            List<StationpediaPage> pages,
            List<(SPDAListItem item, StationpediaPage page, Transform transform)> items,
            HashSet<string> existingPageKeys)
        {
            try
            {
                // Get reference to the SPDAListItem prefab from an existing item
                if (items.Count == 0 || stationpedia.SearchContents == null) return;
                
                var templateItem = items[0].item;
                if (templateItem == null) return;
                
                foreach (var page in pages)
                {
                    // Skip if somehow already added
                    if (existingPageKeys.Contains(page.Key)) continue;
                    
                    // Clone an existing list item
                    var newGO = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(templateItem.gameObject, stationpedia.SearchContents);
                    newGO.name = $"InjectedResult_{page.Key}";
                    newGO.SetActive(true);
                    
                    var newListItem = newGO.GetComponent<SPDAListItem>();
                    if (newListItem != null)
                    {
                        // Set the display title
                        if (newListItem.InsertTitle != null)
                        {
                            newListItem.InsertTitle.text = page.Title;
                        }
                        
                        // Set the page reference so clicking works
                        newListItem.PageReference = page;
                        
                        // Add to our items list for scoring
                        items.Add((newListItem, page, newGO.transform));
                        existingPageKeys.Add(page.Key);
                        
                        // Track for cleanup
                        _injectedItems.Add(newGO);
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Debug.LogError($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error injecting results: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

        private static void CleanupCategoryHeaders()
        {
            foreach (var header in _searchCategoryHeaders)
            {
                if (header != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(header);
                }
            }
            _searchCategoryHeaders.Clear();
            
            // Also cleanup injected items
            foreach (var item in _injectedItems)
            {
                if (item != null)
                {
                    UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(item);
                }
            }
            _injectedItems.Clear();
            
            _lastSearchText = "";
            _lastResultCount = -1;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Determines if a page should be hidden from search results.
        /// Filters out ruptured/burnt cables and other debris items.
        /// </summary>
        private static bool ShouldHideFromSearch(StationpediaPage page)
        {
            if (page == null) return false;
            
            string key = page.Key ?? "";
            string title = page.Title ?? "";
            // Strip rich text tags for proper matching
            string cleanTitle = Regex.Replace(title, "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
            
            // Hide ruptured/burnt cables
            if (key.Contains("Ruptured") || cleanTitle.Contains("Ruptured"))
                return true;
            if (key.Contains("CableRuptured"))
                return true;
                
            // Hide burnt items
            if (cleanTitle.StartsWith("Burnt ") || cleanTitle.StartsWith("Burnt") || key.Contains("Burnt"))
                return true;
                
            return false;
        }
```

        /// <summary>
        /// Find pages that should match the search but weren't returned by vanilla search.
        /// This fixes the vanilla bug where too many partial matches hide exact matches.
        /// </summary>
        private static List<StationpediaPage> FindMissingMatches(string searchText, HashSet<string> existingPageKeys)
        {
            var missingPages = new List<StationpediaPage>();
            string searchLower = searchText.ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
            string escapedSearch = Regex.Escape(searchLower);
            Regex wholeWordRegex = new Regex($@"\b{escapedSearch}\b", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);
            
            foreach (var page in Stationpedia.StationpediaPages)
            {
                // Skip if already in results
                if (existingPageKeys.Contains(page.Key)) continue;
                
                // Skip items that should be hidden (burnt, ruptured, etc.)
                if (ShouldHideFromSearch(page)) continue;
                
                string title = Regex.Replace(page.Title ?? "", "<[^>]+>", "").ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
                
                // Check for exact match or whole-word match (high priority items only)
                bool isExact = title == searchLower;
                bool isWholeWord = wholeWordRegex.IsMatch(title);
                
                if (isExact || isWholeWord)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] INJECTING missing match: '{page.Title}' (exact: {isExact}, wholeWord: {isWholeWord})");
                    missingPages.Add(page);
                }
            }
            
            return missingPages;
        }
```

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Determines if a page should be hidden from search results.
        /// Filters out ruptured/burnt cables, wreckage, and other debris items.
        /// Also respects the game's HideInStationpedia flag.
        /// </summary>
        private static bool ShouldHideFromSearch(StationpediaPage page)
        {
            if (page == null) return false;
            
            string key = page.Key ?? "";
            string title = page.Title ?? "";
            // Strip rich text tags for proper matching
            string cleanTitle = Regex.Replace(title, "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
            string cleanTitleLower = cleanTitle.ToLowerInvariant();
            
            // Check if the prefab has HideInStationpedia set
            if (key.StartsWith("Thing"))
            {
                string prefabName = key.Substring(5);
                Thing thing = Prefab.Find(prefabName);
                if (thing != null && thing.HideInStationpedia)
                    return true;
                    
                // Also check HiddenInPedia dictionary
                bool hiddenInPedia = false;
                if (Stationpedia.DataHandler?.HiddenInPedia?.TryGetValue(prefabName, out hiddenInPedia) == true && hiddenInPedia)
                    return true;
            }
            
            // Hide ruptured/burnt cables
            if (key.Contains("Ruptured") || cleanTitleLower.Contains("ruptured"))
                return true;
            if (key.Contains("CableRuptured"))
                return true;
                
            // Hide burnt items
            if (cleanTitleLower.StartsWith("burnt ") || cleanTitleLower.StartsWith("burnt") || key.Contains("Burnt"))
                return true;
                
            // Hide wreckage items
            if (cleanTitleLower.Contains("wreckage") || key.Contains("Wreckage"))
                return true;
                
            return false;
        }
```

- oldString:

        /// <summary>
        /// Determines if a page should be hidden from search results.
        /// Filters out ruptured/burnt cables and other debris items.
        /// </summary>
        private static bool ShouldHideFromSearch(StationpediaPage page)
        {
            if (page == null) return false;
            
            string key = page.Key ?? "";
            string title = page.Title ?? "";
            // Strip rich text tags for proper matching
            string cleanTitle = Regex.Replace(title, "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
            
            // Hide ruptured/burnt cables
            if (key.Contains("Ruptured") || cleanTitle.Contains("Ruptured"))
                return true;
            if (key.Contains("CableRuptured"))
                return true;
                
            // Hide burnt items
            if (cleanTitle.StartsWith("Burnt ") || cleanTitle.StartsWith("Burnt") || key.Contains("Burnt"))
                return true;
                
            return false;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Add burnt cables, wreckage, and other debris items to HiddenInPedia 
        /// so vanilla search doesn't return them at all.
        /// </summary>
        private static void PopulateHiddenItems()
        {
            if (_hiddenItemsPopulated) return;
            _hiddenItemsPopulated = true;
            
            try
            {
                var hiddenPedia = Stationpedia.DataHandler?.HiddenInPedia;
                if (hiddenPedia == null)
                {
                    Log?.LogWarning("HiddenInPedia dictionary not available");
                    return;
                }
                
                int hiddenCount = 0;
                int prefabCount = 0;
                
                // Iterate through all prefabs and hide unwanted items
                foreach (Thing thing in Prefab.AllPrefabs)
                {
                    if (thing == null) continue;
                    prefabCount++;
                    
                    string prefabName = thing.PrefabName ?? "";
                    string displayName = thing.DisplayName ?? "";
                    string displayNameLower = displayName.ToLowerInvariant();
                    string prefabNameLower = prefabName.ToLowerInvariant();
                    
                    bool shouldHide = false;
                    
                    // Hide burnt items
                    if (displayNameLower.StartsWith("burnt") || prefabNameLower.Contains("burnt"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide ruptured items
                    if (displayNameLower.Contains("ruptured") || prefabNameLower.Contains("ruptured"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide CableRuptured class items
                    if (thing is Assets.Scripts.Objects.Electrical.CableRuptured)
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide wreckage items
                    if (displayNameLower.Contains("wreckage") || prefabNameLower.Contains("wreckage"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    if (shouldHide)
                    {
                        // Debug: log what we're hiding
                        if (hiddenCount < 10)
                        {
                            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[SLP] Hiding: '{prefabName}' / '{displayName}'");
                        }
                        
                        hiddenPedia[prefabName] = true;
                        thing.HideInStationpedia = true;
                        hiddenCount++;
                    }
                }
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Checked {prefabCount} prefabs, hidden {hiddenCount} debris items from search (burnt cables, wreckage, etc.)");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Log?.LogError($"Error populating hidden items: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Add burnt cables, wreckage, and other debris items to HiddenInPedia 
        /// so vanilla search doesn't return them at all.
        /// </summary>
        private static void PopulateHiddenItems()
        {
            if (_hiddenItemsPopulated) return;
            _hiddenItemsPopulated = true;
            
            try
            {
                var hiddenPedia = Stationpedia.DataHandler?.HiddenInPedia;
                if (hiddenPedia == null)
                {
                    Log?.LogWarning("HiddenInPedia dictionary not available");
                    return;
                }
                
                int hiddenCount = 0;
                
                // Iterate through all prefabs and hide unwanted items
                foreach (Thing thing in Prefab.AllPrefabs)
                {
                    if (thing == null) continue;
                    
                    string prefabName = thing.PrefabName ?? "";
                    string displayName = thing.DisplayName ?? "";
                    string displayNameLower = displayName.ToLowerInvariant();
                    string prefabNameLower = prefabName.ToLowerInvariant();
                    
                    bool shouldHide = false;
                    
                    // Hide burnt items
                    if (displayNameLower.StartsWith("burnt") || prefabNameLower.Contains("burnt"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide ruptured items
                    if (displayNameLower.Contains("ruptured") || prefabNameLower.Contains("ruptured"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide CableRuptured class items
                    if (thing is Assets.Scripts.Objects.Electrical.CableRuptured)
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide wreckage items
                    if (displayNameLower.Contains("wreckage") || prefabNameLower.Contains("wreckage"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    if (shouldHide && !hiddenPedia.ContainsKey(prefabName))
                    {
                        hiddenPedia[prefabName] = true;
                        thing.HideInStationpedia = true;
                        hiddenCount++;
                    }
                }
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Hidden {hiddenCount} debris items from search (burnt cables, wreckage, etc.)");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Log?.LogError($"Error populating hidden items: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Add burnt cables, wreckage, and other debris items to HiddenInPedia 
        /// so vanilla search doesn't return them at all.
        /// Also removes their pages from StationpediaPages since they were already registered.
        /// </summary>
        private static void PopulateHiddenItems()
        {
            if (_hiddenItemsPopulated) return;
            _hiddenItemsPopulated = true;
            
            try
            {
                var hiddenPedia = Stationpedia.DataHandler?.HiddenInPedia;
                if (hiddenPedia == null)
                {
                    Log?.LogWarning("HiddenInPedia dictionary not available");
                    return;
                }
                
                int hiddenCount = 0;
                int prefabCount = 0;
                var pagesToRemove = new List<string>();
                
                // Iterate through all prefabs and hide unwanted items
                foreach (Thing thing in Prefab.AllPrefabs)
                {
                    if (thing == null) continue;
                    prefabCount++;
                    
                    string prefabName = thing.PrefabName ?? "";
                    string displayName = thing.DisplayName ?? "";
                    string displayNameLower = displayName.ToLowerInvariant();
                    string prefabNameLower = prefabName.ToLowerInvariant();
                    
                    bool shouldHide = false;
                    
                    // Hide burnt items
                    if (displayNameLower.StartsWith("burnt") || prefabNameLower.Contains("burnt"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide ruptured items
                    if (displayNameLower.Contains("ruptured") || prefabNameLower.Contains("ruptured"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide CableRuptured class items
                    if (thing is Assets.Scripts.Objects.Electrical.CableRuptured)
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide wreckage items
                    if (displayNameLower.Contains("wreckage") || prefabNameLower.Contains("wreckage"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    if (shouldHide)
                    {
                        // Debug: log what we're hiding
                        if (hiddenCount < 10)
                        {
                            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[SLP] Hiding: '{prefabName}' / '{displayName}'");
                        }
                        
                        hiddenPedia[prefabName] = true;
                        thing.HideInStationpedia = true;
                        hiddenCount++;
                        
                        // Track the page key to remove from StationpediaPages
                        pagesToRemove.Add("Thing" + prefabName);
                    }
                }
                
                // Remove pages that were already registered
                int pagesRemoved = 0;
                foreach (string pageKey in pagesToRemove)
                {
                    // Find and remove the page from StationpediaPages
                    var pageToRemove = Stationpedia.StationpediaPages.Find(p => p.Key == pageKey);
                    if (pageToRemove != null)
                    {
                        Stationpedia.StationpediaPages.Remove(pageToRemove);
                        pagesRemoved++;
                    }
                }
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Hidden {hiddenCount} debris items, removed {pagesRemoved} pages from search (burnt cables, wreckage, etc.)");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Log?.LogError($"Error populating hidden items: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Add burnt cables, wreckage, and other debris items to HiddenInPedia 
        /// so vanilla search doesn't return them at all.
        /// </summary>
        private static void PopulateHiddenItems()
        {
            if (_hiddenItemsPopulated) return;
            _hiddenItemsPopulated = true;
            
            try
            {
                var hiddenPedia = Stationpedia.DataHandler?.HiddenInPedia;
                if (hiddenPedia == null)
                {
                    Log?.LogWarning("HiddenInPedia dictionary not available");
                    return;
                }
                
                int hiddenCount = 0;
                int prefabCount = 0;
                
                // Iterate through all prefabs and hide unwanted items
                foreach (Thing thing in Prefab.AllPrefabs)
                {
                    if (thing == null) continue;
                    prefabCount++;
                    
                    string prefabName = thing.PrefabName ?? "";
                    string displayName = thing.DisplayName ?? "";
                    string displayNameLower = displayName.ToLowerInvariant();
                    string prefabNameLower = prefabName.ToLowerInvariant();
                    
                    bool shouldHide = false;
                    
                    // Hide burnt items
                    if (displayNameLower.StartsWith("burnt") || prefabNameLower.Contains("burnt"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide ruptured items
                    if (displayNameLower.Contains("ruptured") || prefabNameLower.Contains("ruptured"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide CableRuptured class items
                    if (thing is Assets.Scripts.Objects.Electrical.CableRuptured)
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    // Hide wreckage items
                    if (displayNameLower.Contains("wreckage") || prefabNameLower.Contains("wreckage"))
                        shouldHide = true;
                    
                    if (shouldHide)
                    {
                        // Debug: log what we're hiding
                        if (hiddenCount < 10)
                        {
                            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[SLP] Hiding: '{prefabName}' / '{displayName}'");
                        }
                        
                        hiddenPedia[prefabName] = true;
                        thing.HideInStationpedia = true;
                        hiddenCount++;
                    }
                }
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Checked {prefabCount} prefabs, hidden {hiddenCount} debris items from search (burnt cables, wreckage, etc.)");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Log?.LogError($"Error populating hidden items: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

Excellent! 🎉 The key was realizing that `HiddenInPedia` is only checked **during page registration**, but by the time our mod runs, pages are already in `Stationpedia.StationpediaPages`. So we needed to:

1. Set `HiddenInPedia[prefabName] = true` (prevents future registration)
2. Set `thing.HideInStationpedia = true` (prevents future registration)  
3. **Remove the pages from `Stationpedia.StationpediaPages`** (removes already-registered pages)

Now searching for "wreck", "burnt", "ruptured" etc. should return no results, keeping the search clean of debris items that players don't need to look up.

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the icon for a category name.
        /// </summary>
        private static string GetCategoryIcon(string category)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(category)) return "●";
            
            if (CategoryIcons.TryGetValue(category, out string icon))
                return icon;
            
            // Try partial matches for localized category names
            string categoryLower = category.ToLowerInvariant();
            
            if (categoryLower.Contains("atmos") || categoryLower.Contains("air")) return "☁";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("pipe")) return "⌭";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("gas")) return "≋";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("battery") || categoryLower.Contains("power")) return "⚡";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("cable") || categoryLower.Contains("wire")) return "⏚";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("light")) return "☀";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("logic") || categoryLower.Contains("circuit")) return "⎔";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("processor") || categoryLower.Contains("computer")) return "⌘";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("fabricat") || categoryLower.Contains("printer")) return "⚙";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("kit")) return "▢";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("food") || categoryLower.Contains("edible")) return "◉";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("plant") || categoryLower.Contains("seed")) return "❀";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("suit") || categoryLower.Contains("armor")) return "👤";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("helmet")) return "◠";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("cloth")) return "⚑";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("tool")) return "⚒";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("weapon") || categoryLower.Contains("gun")) return "⌖";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("wall") || categoryLower.Contains("floor") || categoryLower.Contains("frame")) return "▣";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("door") || categoryLower.Contains("airlock")) return "⌸";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("chair") || categoryLower.Contains("table") || categoryLower.Contains("furniture")) return "⊞";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("chute") || categoryLower.Contains("conveyor")) return "⇲";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("cargo") || categoryLower.Contains("storage") || categoryLower.Contains("locker")) return "⬡";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("rocket") || categoryLower.Contains("engine")) return "⏶";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("genetic") || categoryLower.Contains("dna")) return "⧬";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("trade") || categoryLower.Contains("vend")) return "⚖";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("reagent") || categoryLower.Contains("chemical")) return "⚗";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("ore") || categoryLower.Contains("mineral")) return "ite";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("ice") || categoryLower.Contains("frozen")) return "❆";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("ingot") || categoryLower.Contains("metal")) return "▬";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("sensor")) return "◎";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("console") || categoryLower.Contains("screen")) return "▤";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("tank") || categoryLower.Contains("canister")) return "⬢";
            
            return "●"; // Default circle
        }

        private static string GetPageCategory(StationpediaPage page)
        {
            if (page == null) return "Other";
            
            // Try to determine category from prefab name or page categories
            if (page.PageCustomCategories != null && page.PageCustomCategories.Count > 0)
            {
                return page.PageCustomCategories[0];
            }
            
            // Parse category from Key (e.g., "ThingSomeDevice" -> check DataHandler)
            string key = page.Key ?? "";
            
            // Check against known category lists
            if (key.StartsWith("Thing"))
            {
                string prefabName = key.Substring(5); // Remove "Thing" prefix
                
                // Try to find in DataHandler's dictionary
                foreach (var listEntry in Stationpedia.DataHandler._listDictionary)
                {
                    foreach (var categoryEntry in listEntry.Value)
                    {
                        foreach (var insert in categoryEntry.Value)
                        {
                            if (insert.PageLink == key)
                            {
                                return categoryEntry.Key; // Return the sub-category name
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Check special page types
            if (key.StartsWith("Gas")) return "Gases";
            if (key.StartsWith("Reagent")) return "Reagents";
            if (key.StartsWith("Gene")) return "Genetics";
            if (key.StartsWith("LogicType")) return "Logic Variables";
            if (key.StartsWith("LogicSlotType")) return "Logic Slot Variables";
            
            return "Other";
        }

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user is seeing boxes instead of the emoji characters. This is likely because the game's TextMeshPro font doesn't include the glyphs for those Unicode emoji characters. 

To add emoji support in Unity/TextMeshPro, you would typically need to:

1. Create a sprite atlas with emoji images
2. Create a TMP Sprite Asset that maps the emoji characters to sprites
3. Configure TextMeshPro to use that sprite asset as a fallback

However, this is quite complex for a mod. Let me think about alternatives:

1. **Use basic Unicode symbols that are more commonly supported** - Characters in the Basic Multilingual Plane (BMP) like ☀, ★, ►, etc. are more likely to be supported by the game's font.

2. **Add a custom font/sprite asset** - We could potentially add a TMP sprite asset to the mod, but this requires:
   - Creating sprite textures
   - Creating the TMP Sprite Asset
   - Loading it at runtime and assigning it to the text components

3. **Check what font the game uses** - The game's Stationpedia likely uses a specific TMP font. We could check if it has a fallback font assigned or what characters it supports.

Let me suggest reverting to simpler Unicode symbols that are more likely to be supported, while also explaining how we could potentially add emoji support as a more advanced feature.

For now, let's go back to basic Unicode symbols that should work:
- ★ (star) - U+2605
- ► (triangle) - U+25BA
- ● (bullet) - U+25CF
- ⚡ (lightning) - U+26A1
- ☀ (sun) - U+2600
- ❄ (snowflake) - U+2744
- ⚙ (gear) - U+2699
- ⚗ (alembic) - U+2697


- ✎ (pencil) - U+270E
- ⚠ (warning) - U+26A0
- ⚖ (scales) - U+2696
- ☁ (cloud) - U+2601
- ❀ (flower) - U+2740

I'll expand the list of compatible Unicode symbols from the Miscellaneous Symbols and Dingbats blocks, ensuring maximum font compatibility across different text rendering systems.

        /// Gets the icon for a category name.
        /// </summary>
        private static string GetCategoryIcon(string category)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(category)) return "[-]";
            
            if (CategoryIcons.TryGetValue(category, out string icon))
                return icon;
            
            // Try partial matches for localized category names
            string categoryLower = category.ToLowerInvariant();
            
            if (categoryLower.Contains("atmos") || categoryLower.Contains("air")) return "[A]";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("pipe")) return "[P]";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("gas") && categoryLower.Contains("can")) return "[GC]";

        /// Gets the icon for a category name.

        private static string GetCategoryIcon(string category)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(category)) return "●";
            
            if (CategoryIcons.TryGetValue(category, out string icon))
                return icon;
            
            // Try partial matches for localized category names
            string categoryLower = category.ToLowerInvariant();
            
            if (categoryLower.Contains("atmos") || categoryLower.Contains("air")) return "☁";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("pipe")) return "◉";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("gas") && categoryLower.Contains("can")) return "◆";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("battery") || categoryLower.Contains("power")) return "⚡";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("cable") || categoryLower.Contains("wire")) return "∿";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("light")) return "☀";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("logic") || categoryLower.Contains("circuit")) return "◈";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("processor") || categoryLower.Contains("computer")) return "▣";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("fabricat") || categoryLower.Contains("printer")) return "⚙";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("kit")) return "▢";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("food") || categoryLower.Contains("edible")) return "♨";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("plant") || categoryLower.Contains("seed")) return "❀";
            if (categoryLower.Contains("suit") || categoryLower.Contains("armor")) return "♦";

        private static int AddCategoryHeader(RectTransform parent, string text, int siblingIndex, Color textColor)
        {
            // Create a simple header GameObject
            var headerGO = new GameObject($"SearchCategoryHeader_{siblingIndex}");
            headerGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            
            // Add to tracking list
            _searchCategoryHeaders.Add(headerGO);
            
            // Add RectTransform
            var rectTransform = headerGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 30);
            
            // Add background image - try to find a rounded sprite from existing UI
            var bgImage = headerGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            bgImage.color = new Color(0.15f, 0.15f, 0.22f, 0.95f);
            
            // Try to get a rounded sprite from an existing list item
            try
            {
                var existingItem = parent.GetComponentInChildren<SPDAListItem>();
                if (existingItem?.InsertsButton != null)
                {
                    var buttonImage = existingItem.InsertsButton.GetComponent<Image>();
                    if (buttonImage?.sprite != null)
                    {
                        bgImage.sprite = buttonImage.sprite;
                        bgImage.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
                    }
                }
            }
            catch { }
            
            // Add text
            var textGO = new GameObject("HeaderText");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(headerGO.transform, false);
            
            var textRT = textGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRT.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRT.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRT.offsetMin = new Vector2(10, 0);
            textRT.offsetMax = new Vector2(-10, 0);
            
            var textComponent = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComponent.text = text;
            textComponent.fontSize = 14;
            textComponent.fontStyle = TMPro.FontStyles.Bold;
            textComponent.color = textColor;
            textComponent.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Left;
            textComponent.verticalAlignment = VerticalAlignmentOptions.Middle;
            
            // Try to get font from existing Stationpedia elements
            try
            {
                var existingText = parent.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
                if (existingText != null)
                {
                    textComponent.font = existingText.font;
                    textComponent.fontSharedMaterial = existingText.fontSharedMaterial;
                }
            }
            catch { }
            
            // Add layout element
            var layoutElement = headerGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            layoutElement.preferredHeight = 30;
            layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1;
            
            // Set sibling index
            headerGO.transform.SetSiblingIndex(siblingIndex);
            
            return siblingIndex + 1;
        }
```

                        bgImage.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
                        foundSprite = true;

            catch { }

            textComponent.fontStyle = TMPro.FontStyles.Bold;

            textComponent.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Left;
            textComponent.verticalAlignment = VerticalAlignmentOptions.Middle;
            
            // Try to get font from existing Stationpedia elements

            layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1;
            
            // Set sibling index

            return siblingIndex + 1;
        }

                foreach (var result in startsWithMatches.OrderBy(r => r.Page.Title))
                {

                }
            }

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

That's possible! Steam Workshop can be finicky about preview images when updating. The "filenotfound" error could be from:

1. **File too large** (1.87MB > 1MB limit) - this was definitely an issue
2. **No preview originally uploaded** - Steam might expect a preview path that was never established
3. **Path mismatch** - The game sending a preview path that doesn't match what Steam has stored

Now that you have a properly sized Preview.png (208KB), try the upload again. If it still says "filenotfound", you might need to:
- Delete and re-publish the mod as a new Workshop item (last resort)

_**User (2025-12-29 11:18:36Z)**_

I think I can't upload becuase I didn't upload the preview.png the first time

---

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

You're probably right. Steam Workshop can be finicky when you try to add a preview image to an item that was originally published without one.

**Options to fix this:**

1. **Steam Web Interface** (easiest):
   - Go to https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3634201807
   - Click "Edit" or the gear icon
   - Upload a preview image directly through the web interface
   - Then the game should be able to update the other content

2. **Delete and Re-publish** (clean slate):
   - Delete the Workshop item from Steam
   - Remove the `<WorkshopHandle>` from your About.xml (or set it to 0)
   - Publish as a new mod - this time WITH the Preview.png

3. **Use SteamCMD** (command line):
   - Download SteamCMD
   - Use `workshop_build_item` with a VDF file to push updates including the preview

**Recommended**: Try option 1 first - upload the preview image via Steam's web interface. That should establish the preview path, and then subsequent game updates should work.

Would you like me to set up the About.xml for a fresh publish (option 2) if the web interface doesn't work?

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

Ah, that clarifies everything! **Yes, this is absolutely possible** and is actually a clever approach.

## Custom Motherboard Cartridge Approach

You're right - the **Space Map cartridge** is the perfect model. It's a `Cartridge` that renders an interactive 2D view with movable objects (planets, ships). Creating a "Build Planner Cartridge" following the same pattern is feasible.

### How Stationeers Cartridges Work

```
Computer/Tablet
    └── Motherboard slot
         └── Cartridge (SpaceMap, Stationpedia, Tracker, etc.)
              └── Custom UI rendering via OnGUI() or Unity UI
```

Each cartridge type:
1. Extends a base `Cartridge` class
2. Implements its own rendering logic
3. Has access to game assets, prefabs, and data
4. Handles input (mouse clicks, keyboard)

### What You'd Need to Build

| Component | Implementation |
|-----------|----------------|
| **New Cartridge class** | `CartridgeBuildPlanner : Cartridge` |
| **Grid system** | C# port of the TypeScript Grid/Cell/Grid3 logic |
| **Object definitions** | Pull from game's `Prefab` database or define subset |
| **Rendering** | Unity `GUI.DrawTexture()` or game's tablet rendering system |
| **Input handling** | Mouse position → grid snapping → place/remove |
| **Project save/load** | Serialize to `Thing.CustomData` or external JSON |

### Why This Works

1. **Space Map proves it**: The game already supports rich, interactive cartridge UIs
2. **Access to game assets**: You can use actual item icons/textures directly
3. **Native grid system**: Stationeers already has `Grid3` - you can match it exactly
4. **Existing infrastructure**: Tablet rendering, input handling, save/load all exist

### Complexity Estimate

| Task | Effort |
|------|--------|
| Reverse-engineer SpaceMap cartridge | 5-10 hours |
| Basic cartridge shell + grid rendering | 10-15 hours |
| Object palette & placement | 15-20 hours |
| Pan/zoom, floor switching, rotation | 10-15 hours |
| Save/load projects | 5-10 hours |
| Polish & testing | 10-20 hours |
| **Total** | **~55-90 hours** |

This is significantly more feasible than a full standalone mod because you're working *within* the game's existing tablet/cartridge framework.

### First Steps

1. **Decompile and study `CartridgeSpaceMap`** - understand how it renders and handles input
2. **Create minimal cartridge** - just draws a grid on the tablet screen
3. **Add object placement** - click to place a frame icon at grid position
4. **Iterate from there**

---

**Verdict: Yes, this is definitely possible!** It's a solid 2-3 month side project for someone familiar with Unity and C# modding. The Space Map cartridge is your roadmap - it already does 80% of what you need architecturally.

Want me to search your decompiled Assembly-CSharp for the `CartridgeSpaceMap` or related cartridge classes so we can see how they're implemented?

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now let me check the SearchPatches.cs file: 

Now I understand both issues. Let me fix them:

## Issue 1: Prefab Name Overlap Fix Not Working

The problem is that `TruncateLongPrefabName` sets `overflowMode = Ellipsis` but **doesn't constrain the width**. TextMeshPro needs a width constraint for Ellipsis mode to work - without it, the text just expands infinitely. The method checks for overlapping siblings but doesn't actually limit the text width.

## Issue 2: Search Optimizations to Implement

From the report, I'll implement:
- **P1**: Eliminate the wait loop (0.5-0.9s gain)
- **P2**: Cache page title index (100-500ms gain)
- **P3**: Cache category lookups (50-200ms gain)

Let me implement all fixes: 

Now let me build and test:

The old code set Ellipsis mode but never constrained the width, so text expanded infinitely. filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\src\Harmony\Patches.cs newString:        private static void TruncateLongPrefabName(UniversalPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(page.PrefabNameText.text))
                    return;

                var rectTransform = page.PrefabNameText.rectTransform;
                if (rectTransform == null) return;

                // Always disable word wrapping to keep it on one line
                page.PrefabNameText.enableWordWrapping = false;
                
                // Set overflow mode to Ellipsis - this REQUIRES a width constraint to work
                page.PrefabNameText.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Ellipsis;
                
                // Add or update LayoutElement to constrain width
                // This is CRITICAL - Ellipsis mode only works if the container has a max width
                var layoutElement = page.PrefabNameText.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                if (layoutElement == null)
                {
                    layoutElement = page.PrefabNameText.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                }
                
                // Set preferred width to leave room for Stack Size and other elements
                // The header row is ~600px wide, so 350px leaves plenty of room
                layoutElement.preferredWidth = 350f;
                layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 0; // Don't stretch beyond preferred
                
                // Also constrain the RectTransform directly for cases where LayoutElement isn't respected
                var sizeDelta = rectTransform.sizeDelta;
                if (sizeDelta.x <= 0 || sizeDelta.x > 350f)
                {
                    rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(350f, sizeDelta.y);
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }

        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(page.PrefabNameText.text))
                    return;

                var rectTransform = page.PrefabNameText.rectTransform;
                if (rectTransform == null) return;

                // Always disable word wrapping to keep it on one line
                page.PrefabNameText.enableWordWrapping = false;

                // Check if there are any sibling elements that could overlap
                var parent = rectTransform.parent;
                if (parent == null)
                {
                    // No parent, just let it overflow naturally
                    page.PrefabNameText.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
                    return;
                }

                // Get the world-space corners of the prefab name text
                Vector3[] textCorners = new Vector3[4];
                rectTransform.GetWorldCorners(textCorners);
                float textLeft = textCorners[0].x;   // Bottom-left corner X
                float textRight = textCorners[2].x;  // Top-right corner X

                // Check all sibling elements to see if any would overlap if text extends
                bool hasOverlappingElements = false;
                foreach (Transform sibling in parent)
                {
                    if (sibling == rectTransform.transform) continue;
                    if (!sibling.gameObject.activeInHierarchy) continue;

                    var siblingRect = sibling.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
                    if (siblingRect == null) continue;

                    // Get sibling's world-space bounds
                    Vector3[] siblingCorners = new Vector3[4];
                    siblingRect.GetWorldCorners(siblingCorners);
                    float siblingLeft = siblingCorners[0].x;
                    float siblingRight = siblingCorners[2].x;

                    // Check if sibling is to the right and could be overlapped
                    // (sibling starts after our left edge, meaning it's to our right)
                    if (siblingLeft > textLeft && siblingLeft < textRight + 100f)
                    {
                        // This element is to the right and within potential overlap range
                        hasOverlappingElements = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }

                if (hasOverlappingElements)
                {
                    // There are elements that could overlap, use Ellipsis to prevent it
                    page.PrefabNameText.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Ellipsis;
                }
                else
                {
                    // No elements at risk of overlap, allow text to overflow naturally
                    page.PrefabNameText.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }

        /// Find pages that should match the search but weren't returned by vanilla search.
        /// This fixes the vanilla bug where too many partial matches hide exact matches.
        /// P2 OPTIMIZATION: Uses cached title index for O(1) lookups instead of O(n) full scan.
        /// </summary>
        private static List<StationpediaPage> FindMissingMatches(string searchText, HashSet<string> existingPageKeys)
        {
            // Build indexes on first use (lazy initialization)
            BuildPageIndexes();
            
            var missingPages = new List<StationpediaPage>();
            string searchLower = searchText.ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
            
            // O(1) lookup for exact title matches
            if (_pageTitleIndex.TryGetValue(searchLower, out var exactPages))
            {
                foreach (var page in exactPages)
                {
                    if (!existingPageKeys.Contains(page.Key) && !ShouldHideFromSearch(page))
                    {
                        ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] INJECTING exact match: '{page.Title}'");
                        missingPages.Add(page);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // O(1) lookup for whole-word matches
            if (_pageWordIndex.TryGetValue(searchLower, out var wordPages))
            {
                foreach (var page in wordPages)
                {
                    // Skip if already added as exact match
                    if (missingPages.Contains(page)) continue;
                    if (!existingPageKeys.Contains(page.Key) && !ShouldHideFromSearch(page))
                    {
                        ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] INJECTING word match: '{page.Title}'");
                        missingPages.Add(page);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            return missingPages;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// P2 OPTIMIZATION: Build page title indexes for O(1) lookups.
        /// Called lazily on first search.
        /// </summary>
        private static void BuildPageIndexes()
        {
            if (_pageTitleIndex != null) return; // Already built
            
            var stopwatch = System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch.StartNew();
            
            _pageTitleIndex = new Dictionary<string, List<StationpediaPage>>();
            _pageWordIndex = new Dictionary<string, List<StationpediaPage>>();
            
            foreach (var page in Stationpedia.StationpediaPages)
            {
                if (ShouldHideFromSearch(page)) continue;
                
                string title = CleanTitle(page.Title).ToLowerInvariant();
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(title)) continue;
                
                // Index by full title for exact matches
                if (!_pageTitleIndex.ContainsKey(title))
                    _pageTitleIndex[title] = new List<StationpediaPage>();
                _pageTitleIndex[title].Add(page);
                
                // Index by individual words for whole-word matches
                string[] words = title.Split(new[] { ' ', '-', '(', ')', '[', ']' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
                foreach (string word in words)
                {
                    if (word.Length < 2) continue; // Skip single chars
                    if (!_pageWordIndex.ContainsKey(word))
                        _pageWordIndex[word] = new List<StationpediaPage>();
                    if (!_pageWordIndex[word].Contains(page))
                        _pageWordIndex[word].Add(page);
                }
            }
            
            stopwatch.Stop();
            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Built page indexes: {_pageTitleIndex.Count} titles, {_pageWordIndex.Count} words in {stopwatch.ElapsedMilliseconds}ms");
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Clean title by removing rich text tags. Uses cache for performance.
        /// </summary>
        private static string CleanTitle(string title)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(title)) return "";
            
            if (_cleanedTitleCache.TryGetValue(title, out string cleaned))
                return cleaned;
            
            cleaned = Regex.Replace(title, "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
            _cleanedTitleCache[title] = cleaned;
            return cleaned;
        } oldString:        /// <summary>
        /// Find pages that should match the search but weren't returned by vanilla search.

        private static List<StationpediaPage> FindMissingMatches(string searchText, HashSet<string> existingPageKeys)
        {
            var missingPages = new List<StationpediaPage>();
            string searchLower = searchText.ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
            string escapedSearch = Regex.Escape(searchLower);
            Regex wholeWordRegex = new Regex($@"\b{escapedSearch}\b", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);
            
            foreach (var page in Stationpedia.StationpediaPages)
            {
                // Skip if already in results
                if (existingPageKeys.Contains(page.Key)) continue;
                
                // Skip items that should be hidden (burnt, ruptured, etc.)
                if (ShouldHideFromSearch(page)) continue;
                
                string title = Regex.Replace(page.Title ?? "", "<[^>]+>", "").ToLowerInvariant().Trim();
                
                // Check for exact match or whole-word match (high priority items only)
                bool isExact = title == searchLower;
                bool isWholeWord = wholeWordRegex.IsMatch(title);
                
                if (isExact || isWholeWord)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Search] INJECTING missing match: '{page.Title}' (exact: {isExact}, wholeWord: {isWholeWord})");
                    missingPages.Add(page);
                }
            }
            
            return missingPages;
        }] map[explanation:Optimize FindPageByTitle to use the cached index instead of O(n) loop filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\src\Harmony\SearchPatches.cs newString:        private static StationpediaPage FindPageByTitle(string title)

        {
            if (page == null) return "Other";
            
            string key = page.Key ?? "";
            
            // P3 OPTIMIZATION: Check cache first
            if (_categoryCache.TryGetValue(key, out string cachedCategory))
            {
                return cachedCategory;
            }
            
            // Build full cache on first miss (amortizes the cost)
            if (!_categoryCacheBuilt)
            {
                BuildCategoryCache();
                if (_categoryCache.TryGetValue(key, out cachedCategory))
                {
                    return cachedCategory;
                }
            }
            
            // Compute category for this page
            string category = ComputePageCategory(page);
            _categoryCache[key] = category;
            return category;
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// P3 OPTIMIZATION: Pre-build the category cache to avoid triple-nested loops.
        /// </summary>
        private static void BuildCategoryCache()
        {
            if (_categoryCacheBuilt) return;
            
            var stopwatch = System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch.StartNew();
            
            try
            {
                // Build reverse lookup from DataHandler's dictionary
                foreach (var listEntry in Stationpedia.DataHandler._listDictionary)
                {
                    foreach (var categoryEntry in listEntry.Value)
                    {
                        string categoryName = categoryEntry.Key;
                        foreach (var insert in categoryEntry.Value)
                        {
                            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(insert.PageLink))
                            {
                                _categoryCache[insert.PageLink] = categoryName;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error building category cache: {ex.Message}");
            }
            
            _categoryCacheBuilt = true;
            stopwatch.Stop();
            ConsoleWindow.Print($"[Stationpedia Ascended] Built category cache: {_categoryCache.Count} entries in {stopwatch.ElapsedMilliseconds}ms");
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Compute category for a page (fallback when not in cache).
        /// </summary>
        private static string ComputePageCategory(StationpediaPage page)
        {
            if (page == null) return "Other";
            
            // Try to determine category from page's custom categories
            if (page.PageCustomCategories != null && page.PageCustomCategories.Count > 0)
            {
                return page.PageCustomCategories[0];
            }
            
            string key = page.Key ?? "";
            
            // Check special page types by key prefix
            if (key.StartsWith("Gas")) return "Gases";
            if (key.StartsWith("Reagent")) return "Reagents";
            if (key.StartsWith("Gene")) return "Genetics";
            if (key.StartsWith("LogicType")) return "Logic Variables";
            if (key.StartsWith("LogicSlotType")) return "Logic Slot Variables";
            
            return "Other";
        } oldString:        private static string GetPageCategory(StationpediaPage page)

        private static void TruncateLongPrefabName(UniversalPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(page.PrefabNameText.text))
                    return;

                var textComponent = page.PrefabNameText;
                
                // Always disable word wrapping to keep it on one line
                textComponent.enableWordWrapping = false;
                
                // Force update to get accurate preferred width
                textComponent.ForceMeshUpdate();
                float textWidth = textComponent.preferredWidth;
                
                // Only apply truncation if the text is actually long
                // 320px threshold leaves room for Stack Size on the right
                const float maxWidth = 320f;
                
                if (textWidth > maxWidth)
                {
                    // Text is too long - enable ellipsis and constrain
                    textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Ellipsis;
                    
                    // Use RectTransform width constraint (don't add LayoutElement - it can break positioning)
                    var rectTransform = textComponent.rectTransform;
                    
                    // Store original anchors/pivot to preserve positioning
                    var originalAnchorMin = rectTransform.anchorMin;
                    var originalAnchorMax = rectTransform.anchorMax;
                    var originalPivot = rectTransform.pivot;
                    
                    // Only modify width, preserve height
                    var sizeDelta = rectTransform.sizeDelta;
                    rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(maxWidth, sizeDelta.y);
                    
                    // Restore anchors in case they got modified
                    rectTransform.anchorMin = originalAnchorMin;
                    rectTransform.anchorMax = originalAnchorMax;
                    rectTransform.pivot = originalPivot;
                }
                else
                {
                    // Text fits - allow overflow (no truncation needed)
                    textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }
        }
```

- oldString:

```
        private static void TruncateLongPrefabName(UniversalPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(page.PrefabNameText.text))
                    return;

                var rectTransform = page.PrefabNameText.rectTransform;
                if (rectTransform == null) return;

                // Always disable word wrapping to keep it on one line
                page.PrefabNameText.enableWordWrapping = false;
                
                // Set overflow mode to Ellipsis - this REQUIRES a width constraint to work
                page.PrefabNameText.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Ellipsis;
                
                // Add or update LayoutElement to constrain width
                // This is CRITICAL - Ellipsis mode only works if the container has a max width
                var layoutElement = page.PrefabNameText.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                if (layoutElement == null)
                {
                    layoutElement = page.PrefabNameText.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                }
                
                // Set preferred width to leave room for Stack Size and other elements
                // The header row is ~600px wide, so 350px leaves plenty of room
                layoutElement.preferredWidth = 350f;
                layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 0; // Don't stretch beyond preferred
                
                // Also constrain the RectTransform directly for cases where LayoutElement isn't respected
                var sizeDelta = rectTransform.sizeDelta;
                if (sizeDelta.x <= 0 || sizeDelta.x > 350f)
                {
                    rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(350f, sizeDelta.y);
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }
        }
