```
        }

        private static void TruncateLongPrefabName(UniversalPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(page.PrefabNameText.text))
                    return;

                var textComponent = page.PrefabNameText;
                string originalText = textComponent.text;
                
                // Skip if already truncated (has ellipsis)
                if (originalText.EndsWith("..."))
                    return;
                
                // Always disable word wrapping to keep it on one line
                textComponent.enableWordWrapping = false;
                textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
                
                // Force update to get accurate preferred width
                textComponent.ForceMeshUpdate();
                float textWidth = textComponent.preferredWidth;
                
                // Only truncate if the text is actually too long
                // 320px threshold leaves room for Stack Size on the right
                const float maxWidth = 320f;
                
                if (textWidth > maxWidth)
                {
                    // Manually truncate the string - don't touch any RectTransform properties!
                    // Binary search to find the right length
                    int maxChars = originalText.Length;
                    int minChars = 1;
                    
                    while (maxChars - minChars > 1)
                    {
                        int mid = (maxChars + minChars) / 2;
                        textComponent.text = originalText.Substring(0, mid) + "...";
                        textComponent.ForceMeshUpdate();
                        
                        if (textComponent.preferredWidth <= maxWidth)
                            minChars = mid;
                        else
                            maxChars = mid;
                    }
                    
                    // Apply the truncated text
                    textComponent.text = originalText.Substring(0, minChars) + "...";
                }
                // If text fits, leave it alone - don't modify anything
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }
        }
```

```
        }

        private static void TruncateLongPrefabName(UniversalPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(page.PrefabNameText.text))
                    return;

                var textComponent = page.PrefabNameText;
                
                // Always disable word wrapping to keep it on one line
                textComponent.enableWordWrapping = false;
                
                // Force update to get accurate preferred width
                textComponent.ForceMeshUpdate();
                float textWidth = textComponent.preferredWidth;
                
                // Only apply truncation if the text is actually long
                // 320px threshold leaves room for Stack Size on the right
                const float maxWidth = 320f;
                
                if (textWidth > maxWidth)
                {
                    // Text is too long - enable ellipsis and constrain
                    textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Ellipsis;
                    
                    // Use RectTransform width constraint (don't add LayoutElement - it can break positioning)
                    var rectTransform = textComponent.rectTransform;
                    
                    // Store original anchors/pivot to preserve positioning
                    var originalAnchorMin = rectTransform.anchorMin;
                    var originalAnchorMax = rectTransform.anchorMax;
                    var originalPivot = rectTransform.pivot;
                    
                    // Only modify width, preserve height
                    var sizeDelta = rectTransform.sizeDelta;
                    rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(maxWidth, sizeDelta.y);
                    
                    // Restore anchors in case they got modified
                    rectTransform.anchorMin = originalAnchorMin;
                    rectTransform.anchorMax = originalAnchorMax;
                    rectTransform.pivot = originalPivot;
                }
                else
                {
                    // Text fits - allow overflow (no truncation needed)
                    textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }
        }
```

```
        private static void TruncateLongPrefabName(UniversalPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(page.PrefabNameText.text))
                    return;

                var textComponent = page.PrefabNameText;
                string originalText = textComponent.text;
                
                // Skip if already truncated (has ellipsis)
                if (originalText.EndsWith("..."))
                    return;
                
                // Always disable word wrapping to keep it on one line
                textComponent.enableWordWrapping = false;
                textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
                
                // Force update to get accurate preferred width
                textComponent.ForceMeshUpdate();
                float textWidth = textComponent.preferredWidth;
                
                // Only truncate if the text is actually too long
                // 320px threshold leaves room for Stack Size on the right
                const float maxWidth = 320f;
                
                if (textWidth > maxWidth)
                {
                    // Manually truncate the string - don't touch any RectTransform properties!
                    // Binary search to find the right length
                    int maxChars = originalText.Length;
                    int minChars = 1;
                    
                    while (maxChars - minChars > 1)
                    {
                        int mid = (maxChars + minChars) / 2;
                        textComponent.text = originalText.Substring(0, mid) + "...";
                        textComponent.ForceMeshUpdate();
                        
                        if (textComponent.preferredWidth <= maxWidth)
                            minChars = mid;
                        else
                            maxChars = mid;
                    }
                    
                    // Apply the truncated text
                    textComponent.text = originalText.Substring(0, minChars) + "...";
                }
                // If text fits, leave it alone - don't modify anything
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }
        }
```

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Truncates long prefab names to prevent overlap with Stack Size.
        /// ONLY modifies the text string - does NOT touch any TextMeshPro properties.
        /// Handles rich text tags properly.
        /// </summary>
        private static void TruncateLongPrefabName(UniversalPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null) return;
                
                string text = page.PrefabNameText.text;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return;
                
                // Skip if already truncated
                if (text.EndsWith("...") || text.EndsWith("...</color>")) return;
                
                // Strip rich text tags to get actual text length
                string plainText = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(text, "<[^>]+>", "");
                
                // Max character count for the actual visible text
                const int maxChars = 28;
                
                if (plainText.Length > maxChars)
                {
                    // Need to truncate - but preserve rich text tags
                    // Find opening color tag if present
                    string openTag = "";
                    string closeTag = "";
                    string innerText = text;
                    
                    if (text.StartsWith("<color="))
                    {
                        int closeAngle = text.IndexOf('>');
                        if (closeAngle > 0)
                        {
                            openTag = text.Substring(0, closeAngle + 1);
                            // Find closing </color> tag
                            int closeTagStart = text.LastIndexOf("</color>");
                            if (closeTagStart > 0)
                            {
                                innerText = text.Substring(closeAngle + 1, closeTagStart - closeAngle - 1);
                                closeTag = "</color>";
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                innerText = text.Substring(closeAngle + 1);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Truncate the inner text
                    if (innerText.Length > maxChars - 3)
                    {
                        innerText = innerText.Substring(0, maxChars - 3) + "...";
                    }
                    
                    // Rebuild with tags
                    page.PrefabNameText.text = openTag + innerText + closeTag;
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }
        }
```

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Truncates long prefab names to prevent overlap with Stack Size.
        /// ONLY modifies the text string - does NOT touch any TextMeshPro properties.
        /// </summary>
        private static void TruncateLongPrefabName(UniversalPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null) return;
                
                string text = page.PrefabNameText.text;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return;
                
                // Skip if already truncated
                if (text.EndsWith("...")) return;
                
                // Max character count based on typical prefab name widths
                // "ItemKitPressureFedLiquidEngine" = 30 chars, too long
                // "ItemKitPressureFedLiquid..." = 25 chars + 3 = good fit
                const int maxChars = 28;
                
                if (text.Length > maxChars)
                {
                    // Truncate with ellipsis - ONLY modify the text string
                    page.PrefabNameText.text = text.Substring(0, maxChars - 3) + "...";
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }
        }
```

- newString:

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Truncates long prefab names to prevent overlap with Stack Size.
        /// Uses TextMeshPro's built-in Ellipsis mode with LayoutElement constraints.
        /// </summary>
        private static void TruncateLongPrefabName(UniversalPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                if (page.PrefabNameText == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(page.PrefabNameText.text))
                    return;
                
                // Configure TextMeshPro to handle overflow dynamically
                page.PrefabNameText.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Ellipsis;
                page.PrefabNameText.enableWordWrapping = false; // Keep on single line
                
                // Add a LayoutElement to constrain the maximum width
                var layoutElement = page.PrefabNameText.gameObject.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                if (layoutElement == null)
                {
                    layoutElement = page.PrefabNameText.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                }
                
                // Set a maximum preferred width
                // This allows the text field to shrink if needed but not grow beyond this width
                layoutElement.preferredWidth = 300f;
                layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 0f; // Don't allow it to expand beyond preferred width
                
                // Also constrain the RectTransform's sizeDelta
                var rectTransform = page.PrefabNameText.rectTransform;
                if (rectTransform != null)
                {
                    // Get current size
                    Vector2 currentSize = rectTransform.sizeDelta;
                    
                    // Constrain width if it's too large (but keep original if smaller)
                    if (currentSize.x > 300f || currentSize.x == 0)
                    {
                        rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(300f, currentSize.y);
                    }
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // Silently ignore errors
            }
        }
```
